Notes: Single UPDATE adds an A RR and deletes the RRset for the same owner/type in the same message; follow-up QUERY checks whether the RRset is present, absent, or the UPDATE was rejected.

Steps.Description: Add y.campus.edu. A and delete the y.campus.edu. A RRset in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: y.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset exists after the conflicting UPDATE.
